race.comment: MOONHAVEN (2) raced back in the small field after a slow start then showed a great turn of foot in the run home to cruise to victory over this course and distance three weeks ago. Maps nicely just off a hot tempo and in what looks a slightly easier race he can get the prize again. LAYDOWNLILY (7) raced handy and just went under in a driving finish over 1100m at Ipswich in open company recently. Best form comes at this trip and she is well in after the 3kg claim. Live chance but needs a little luck from a tricky gate. BONFIRE SPARK (11) bolted in over today's journey at the Sunshine Coast last start. Building a nice five-furlong profile so cannot be left out of calculations. PORT ERIN (3) hits this third up from a break and having improved last time. In the mix.
